Issues: The image is aesthetically pleasing and non-controversial, making it highly suitable for general commercial use.

The primary issue related to selling this image is ensuring that the original source or the created work is properly owned or licensed to the seller. If the image is not the original work of the seller, selling it may violate intellectual property rights.
The stylistic execution is simple, which can increase commercial appeal, but technical quality (resolution, sharpness, and unique artistic style) is critical for maximizing sales viability.
